# Supply chain payloads that should be blocked (known malicious — in threat DB)
# All entries here must have a hard block (exit 2), not just an ask (exit 0).
# Add to supply-guard-hook/src/threats/knownMalicious.ts when adding new entries.
pip install coloama   # typosquat of colorama — credential harvester (2022)
pip install requets   # typosquat of requests — transposition attack
npm install crossenv  # typosquat of cross-env — env var exfiltration (2017)
bun add lodahs        # typosquat of lodash — transposition attack
